address.address1: Jalan K.H. Agus Salim No.3 , Ujong Kareung , Kota Sabang

usefulInfo.name: Breakfast charge (unless included in room price)
License Id / Local Tax ID/ Entity Name

description.short: RedDoorz Syariah @ Sumur Tiga Beach Sabang Aceh sits on Weh Island, steps from pristine beaches and top diving sites amid lush hills and Acehnese culture. Ideal for two travelers seeking relaxation and adventure, the property offers private beach access, a dedicated concierge for bespoke arrangements, and an elegant garden restaurant with room service available. Rooms include a smart workspace, flat-screen TV, complimentary bottled water and luxury toiletries; select rooms provide sweeping city views. Practical, comfortable, and well-located for exploring Sabang. [Some content may be Generative AI assisted. Inaccuracies may occur.]

comments.reviewComments: It's quite affordable and accessible with its facilities, but it's a bit far from the city. For those who are lazy to go out, you can order food here.
comments.originalComment:
Sesuailah.. dengan fasilitas nya, lumayan murah dan trjangkau, tapi agak lumayan jauh dr kota..
Yg malas kluar bisa pesan makan dsini..

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.responderName: RedDoorz Syariah @ Sumur Tiga Beach Sabang Aceh
comments.reviewComments:
my friend and I last minute plan come to aceh for watersport. so we came across this hotel.. we are both hotelier.. we were impressed by the people there.. we left our phone charger at the city and had to trouble the guy to borrow.. but apparently my phone doesn't compatible with few charger... but he was genuinely helpful till we manage to charges the phone the whole day. everyone there was helpful and nice..

the price was cheap.. the food was great.. we will definitely comeback to indonesia again. 

I think if the hotel have fund they can improve on the garden landscape and refurbish the infrastructure and they have high chances to be 1 of the best in sabang..
comments.reviewTitle: the view and the people there was amazing

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.responderName: RedDoorz Syariah @ Sumur Tiga Beach Sabang Aceh
comments.reviewComments:
This is not a 3-star location
2 star at best, and only because the management on site was very helpful at addressing some of my issues.

Not really on the beach, but there is access after going down some steep rocky stairs and then a climb over some rocks.

The rooms, and bathrooms in particular, are very run down. Soap and mineral deposits caked the bathroom tiles and mirrors. Wifi issues constantly. No hot water or flushing toilets. And there are no wardrobe closets or televisions as indicated on booking app photos.  Beds were decent and clean. Pictures on app must have been from many, many years ago. I would add my own photos but the app won't let me.

Kitchen staff were rude to me and talked about me behind my back. Only ate here once due to the lack of vegetarian options, and that meal had me on the toilet for days afterwards.

Nice sea view if you book an upper level room. However, no insulation between  rooms so expect to hear your neighbors very easily.

Reddoorz seems to have stopped investing in their properties long ago. Similar experience with shoddy rooms at other reddoorz locations. Will not stay with Reddorz ever again.

MUCH better values to be had within the area.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.responderName: RedDoorz Syariah @ Sumur Tiga Beach Sabang Aceh
comments.reviewComments: I booked on the day of my staying. Very comfortable and clean bed and mattress but there were no hot water or heater. I should comment the staff helped me arrange transportation to zero km

comments.responderName: RedDoorz Syariah @ Sumur Tiga Beach Sabang Aceh
comments.reviewComments:
Pros
The price offered is extremely affordable. It took around 5 minutes to travel from hotel to Sabang town. The staff is friendly and really helpful. 

Cons
The room's toilet cleanliness is quite average but can be improved and need to improve on facilities such as hotel lobby and reopen the restaurant.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.responderName: RedDoorz Syariah @ Sumur Tiga Beach Sabang Aceh
comments.responseText:
Shabrina yang Terhormat,
Salam hangat dari Reddoorz Indonesia. Terimakasih telah meluangkan waktu untuk memberikan penilaian. Kami memohon maaf kepada Anda atas pengalaman yang tidak menyenangkan selama menginap. Kami akan meyakinkan anda akan mendapatkan pelayanan yang lebih baik.
Dengan Hormat, Tim Reservasi

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.responderName: RedDoorz Syariah @ Sumur Tiga Beach Sabang Aceh
comments.reviewNegatives:
Hôtel vraiment à l’abandon (tapisserie arrachée, douche qui fuit de partout: du coup c’est douche au seau, fuîtes d’eau de partout dans la salle de bain, fourmis, odeur nauséabonde dans la salle de bain etc)
Bien que les personnes soient gentilles personne ne parle anglais et on nous a couru après jusqu’à 22h tous les soirs pour payer la chambre. Le prix a augmenté chaque jour alors que le camp était au 3/4 vide enfin bref nous nous sommes dit que les commentaires ne reflètent pas du tout l’état déplorable de l’endroit. 

Les seuls + sont la vue et l’accès à la plage.
comments.reviewPositives: La vue et l’emplacement mais rien d’autre
comments.reviewTitle: Allez ailleurs sauf pour une nuit

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.responderName: RedDoorz Syariah @ Sumur Tiga Beach Sabang Aceh
comments.reviewComments: Not Really recommended for traveller who want to relax at the hotel. Room not clean. However, staff very cooperative and helpful. The booking was not link between agoda and reddoorz System . They dont have record for our booking and even taking long time to confirm on the payment . For those booking this hotel via agoda Better you go for check in first rather check in late.
comments.reviewTitle: Not So clean . Room Just find for over night

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.responderName: RedDoorz Syariah @ Sumur Tiga Beach Sabang Aceh
comments.reviewComments: I have become a regular on every trip to Sabang and always stay here; the atmosphere is comfortable and very suitable for vacationing and sightseeing.
comments.originalComment: Sudah jadi langganan setiap trip ke sabang dan selalu bermalam disini, suasana nyaman dan sangat cocok untuk berlibur dan berwisata.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.responderName: RedDoorz Syariah @ Sumur Tiga Beach Sabang Aceh
comments.reviewComments: The room is quite nice and comfortable. The bathroom is clean, and the air conditioning is cold. However, cleanliness needs to be improved on some items, such as under the bed and the mirror in the bathroom. The price is also affordable, and the view is nice, directly facing the beach.
comments.originalComment: Kamarnya cukup bagus dan nyaman. kamar mandinya bersih, ac nya dingin. namun perlu ditingkatkan lagi kebersihannya pada beberapa item misal pada kolong tempat tidur dan kaca di kamar mandi. harganya juga murah dan pemandangannya bagus langsung berhadapan dengan pantai.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.responderName: RedDoorz Syariah @ Sumur Tiga Beach Sabang Aceh
comments.reviewComments: For the price, it's really great, there’s AC.. The mattress, pillows, and blankets are very soft. It's nice for resting.. My suggestion is it would be better if the bathroom is cleaned because there are a lot of stains.. It is clean, but there are stains in the bucket and the faucet to make it more pleasing to the eye.. hehehe So far everything is good.. But sleeping in the upper part is wood, so it gets hot during the day.. even with the AC on it doesn’t help.. hehehe At night it gets cold though.. Makes me want to go to Sabang again Oh yes, there’s access to go down to the beach here.. so you can play sand and water..
comments.originalComment:
Utk hrga sih Ok banget, ada AC nya..
Kasur, bantal dan selimut ny lembut banget. Enak untuk istirahat deh..
Saran sih, alangkah baik nya kamar mandi nya d bersihkan karena bnyk kerak2 gtu.. bersih sih bersih, cmn ada kerak2 d ember, d kran nya biar lbh enak d pandang.. hihi
So far bagus semua.. Tp kl tidur d bagian atas itu kan kayu yah, jd kl siang panas.. buka AC jg kagak mempan.. hihi.. kl malam uda dingin sih..
Jd pengen k sabang lagi
Oh ya, d sni ada akses utk turun k pantai nya yah.. jd bs main pasir dan air..

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.responderName: RedDoorz Syariah @ Sumur Tiga Beach Sabang Aceh
comments.reviewComments:
The price is quite cheap because there is air conditioning. But after returning from there, my body turned red and itchy. After checking with the doctor, the doctor said it was an insect bite. 😂 
They do not recommend sleeping in the downstairs room, because if there are people walking or talking upstairs, it automatically sounds all the way to the room, because the ceiling is asbestos. So it’s really loud..
The location is pretty far from the city, but if you rent a motorcycle, you can just ride the motorcycle. Also, in this hotel, there is access to go down to the beach, so you can swim.
comments.originalComment:
Untuk harga sih termasuk murah ya, karena ada AC. Tapi setelah plng dr sni, badan saya merah dan gatal2. Setelah cek dokter, kt dokter di gigit serangga. 😂
Gak di sarani tidur d kamar bawah, karena kl d atas ada orang yg jalan atau berbicara otomatis terdengar sampe kamar, krn atasnya asbes. Jadi kedengaran banget..
Untuk lokasi nya lumayan jauh dari kota, cuman kl ada sewa motor yah tinggal naik motor aja.. trs d hotel ni ada akses utk turun k pantai, jd bs mandi2..

comments.reviewPositives: Er was een goede airco en je zat dicht tegen het strand.

comments.reviewComments:
Sukaa sih nginep disini. Dengan harga yang terjangkau ditambah dengan lokasinya Deket banget sama pantai sumur tiga. 
Untuk kamarnya standar, sama kaya yang di foto. Hanya aja mungkin agak kurang perawatan ya. Kamar mandinya bersih sebenernya cuma mungkin karna ada noda yang gak bisa dibersihkan jadi terkesan nya kotor, tapi bersih sebenarnya. Airnya juga kencang untuk mandi.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.responderName: RedDoorz Syariah @ Sumur Tiga Beach Sabang Aceh
comments.reviewComments: Stafnya sgt tdk profesional. Barang tamu yg ketinggalan, dibawa pulang ke rmh dgn alasan keamanan (berarti hotelnya segitu gak amannya y? ) . Trs nawarkan utk mengantar brg ny ke pelabuhan (dgn biaya tambahan 100rb). Tp  tamunya mau ambil brg yg tertinggal tsb ke hotel,  dimintai uang 50rb dgn alasan ongkos utk ambil ke rmh staf hotelnya. Baru x ni nginap di hotel trs brg ketinggalan, hrs bayar lg. Btw brg yg ketinggalan cm kabel charger lho, sampe hrs dibawa ke rmh ya. Lawak g sh? Segitunya yg nyari uang tambahan itu. Sangat kecewa pokoknya dan gk akan mau nginap di sana lg 👎

comments.reviewNegatives: When enter the room, it is not as described on booking.com. Sandy room floor, uncomfortable pillows, television not functioning and even wifi not available in the room. The worst part is the dirty bathroom and water dripping from the bathroom ceiling above. I can also hear the movement from upstair room. The room balcony also dirty and not well maintained.
comments.reviewTitle: The worst stay in my entire holiday.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.responderName: RedDoorz Syariah @ Sumur Tiga Beach Sabang Aceh
comments.reviewComments: Kamar AC, kasur dan bantal empuk, ada beranda menghadap pantai, ada wifi di lobby, yang paling penting paling budget friendly. View dari kamar biasa aja sebenernya. Tapi coba turun ke tangga pantai. Itu best view sih di antara hotel lain di sumur tiga. Sarapan di sana jg murah. Kalo mau ke freddies, juga deket. Buat nongkrong dan makan2 aja. Tapi minusnya kamar mandinya licin. Tolong dikosek misal 1- 2 minggu sekali pake pembersih kerak. Soalnya bahaya bgt kalo tamu g hati2. Staff sangat baik
comments.reviewTitle: Best budget hotel in sumur tiga

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.responderName: RedDoorz Syariah @ Sumur Tiga Beach Sabang Aceh
comments.reviewComments: The hotel's rates are reasonable. Every room has a beautiful view of the ocean. It takes roughly 8 minutes to ride from the jetty to the hotel. The staff is friendly and helpful, and the wifi service is adequate. The hotels appear to be old and might benefit from upgrades to amenities such as restrooms and air conditioning.
comments.reviewTitle: enjoy the ocean view from an isolated location
